description_long: This is a low-profile, rectangular wooden cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring a rich walnut finish. The front face displays a combination of a large black panel on the left, likely a sliding or drop-down door, and two horizontal drawers or doors on the right with subtle black recessed handles. The cabinet stands on four short, blocky legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The top and sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing its modern aesthetic. The overall construction suggests it is sturdy and designed for storage, possibly for media equipment or general household items. No glass panels or visible contents are present, and the object appears to be freestanding.
description: A modern, low-profile walnut cabinet with a black panel and two drawers, standing on short legs. Its minimalist design features smooth surfaces and subtle black handles.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large black panel on the left and two horizontal drawers with black handles on the right.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, unadorned wooden surface with no visible handles or panels.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view showing a continuous wooden surface with two black recessed handles, no black panel visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing a plain wooden surface, mirroring the left side with no visible features.
